regexCodeList.string: ^You hide your true intentions and become another face in the crowd\.$
^Your facade crumbles, revealing your true nature\.$
^You fail in your attempt to blend into the crowd\.$

Script.name: Clandestine_Melt_Script
Script.script:
-- ============================================================ -- Clandestine_Melt – Mudlet script -- Original MUSHclient plugin by Gizmmo (v1.2) -- Purpose: Warns when clandestine is about to melt & auto-buffs -- ============================================================
clandestine = clandestine or {} clandestine.alignment = nil clandestine.cl_enable = nil clandestine.warningTimerID = nil
-- ================= Persistence =================
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local CLANDESTINE_STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/clandestine_melt_state.txt"
function clandestine.load() local f = io.open(CLANDESTINE_STATE_FILE, "r") if f then local value = f:read("*a") f:close() value = tostring(value or ""):gsub("%s+", "") if value == "on" or value == "off" then clandestine.cl_enable = value end end
if clandestine.cl_enable == nil then clandestine.cl_enable = "on" end end
function clandestine.save() local f = io.open(CLANDESTINE_STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write(clandestine.cl_enable or "on") f:close() end end
-- ================= Core Functions =================
function clandestine.castClandestine() if clandestine.cl_enable == "on" then send("clandestine") end end
function clandestine.onSuccessfulCast() send("aff clandestine") end
function clandestine.onDuration() local minutes = tonumber(matches[2]) local seconds = tonumber(matches[3])
if seconds < 30 then minutes = minutes - 1 seconds = seconds + 60 end
-- warn with 30 seconds left seconds = seconds - 30
local totalSeconds = (minutes * 60) + seconds if totalSeconds < 0 then totalSeconds = 0 end
-- Kill any existing warning timer if clandestine.warningTimerID then killTimer(clandestine.warningTimerID) clandestine.warningTimerID = nil end
clandestine.warningTimerID = tempTimer(totalSeconds, function() clandestine.showWarning() clandestine.warningTimerID = nil end) end
function clandestine.showWarning() for i = 1, 5 do cecho("<orange>CLANDESTINE <gray>will melt in <red>30 SECONDS!\n") end end
-- ================= GMCP Handler =================
function clandestine.onGMCPCharStatus(event) if not gmcp or not gmcp.char or not gmcp.char.status then return end
local newAlign = tonumber(gmcp.char.status.align) if not newAlign then return end
if clandestine.alignment == nil then clandestine.alignment = newAlign return end
if clandestine.alignment ~= newAlign then local oldAlign = clandestine.alignment clandestine.alignment = newAlign
tempTimer(0.1, function() local alignmentColor = "light_gray" if newAlign > 874 then alignmentColor = "yellow" elseif newAlign < -874 then alignmentColor = "red" end
cecho("<orange>::::::::::::: <cyan>ALIGNMENT CHANGE: ")
if oldAlign < newAlign then cecho("<yellow>+" .. tostring(newAlign - oldAlign)) elseif oldAlign > newAlign then cecho("<red>" .. tostring(newAlign - oldAlign)) end
cecho("<orange>|<" .. alignmentColor .. ">" .. tostring(newAlign) .. "<orange> :::::::::::::\n")
clandestine.castClandestine() end) end end
-- ================= Alias Handler =================
function clandestine.aliasHandler() local arg = (matches[2] or ""):lower()
if arg == "" then -- Show current alignment if not gmcp or not gmcp.char or not gmcp.char.status then cecho("<orange>::::::::::::: <white>GMCP data not available yet <orange>:::::::::::::\n") return end
local align = tonumber(gmcp.char.status.align) if align then clandestine.alignment = align end
local alignStr = tostring(clandestine.alignment or "?")
if clandestine.cl_enable == "on" then cecho("<orange>::::::::::::: <cyan>Current Align: " .. alignStr .. "<orange> :::::::::::::\n") elseif clandestine.cl_enable == "off" then cecho("<orange>::::::::::::: <red>Current Align: " .. alignStr .. "<orange> :::::::::::::\n") else cecho("<orange>::::::::::::: <white>Current Align: " .. alignStr .. "<orange> :::::::::::::\n") end
elseif arg == "on" then clandestine.cl_enable = "on" clandestine.save() clandestine.castClandestine() cecho("<orange>Auto buff clandestine: <cyan>ON\n")
elseif arg == "off" then clandestine.cl_enable = "off" clandestine.save() cecho("<orange>Auto buff clandestine: <red>OFF\n")
elseif arg == "help" then clandestine.showHelp() end end
-- ================= Colorized Help =================
function clandestine.showHelp() local divider = string.rep("-", 74)
cecho("\n<gold>." .. divider .. ".\n") cecho("<gold>|<white> Clandestine auto buff mod by Gizmmo <gold>|\n") cecho("<gold>|" .. divider .. "|\n") cecho("<gold>| <cyan>cl help <gray> - this info <gold>|\n") cecho("<gold>| <cyan>cl on<gray>|<cyan>off <gray> - enable or disable clandestine auto buff <gold>|\n") cecho("<gold>| <cyan>cl <gray> - display current align. <cyan>Cyan<gray> if on, <red>Red<gray> if off <gold>|\n") cecho("<gold>'" .. divider .. "'\n\n") end
-- ================= Init =================
function clandestine.init() clandestine.load()
if clandestine.cl_enable == "on" then clandestine.showHelp() end
cecho("<gold>[<white>Clandestine_Melt<gold>] <green>Loaded (v1.2). Auto-buff is <cyan>" .. clandestine.cl_enable:upper() .. "<green>.\n") end
-- Register GMCP event handler if type(killAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" and clandestine._gmcpHandlerID then killAnonymousEventHandler(clandestine._gmcpHandlerID) end if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then clandestine._gmcpHandlerID = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.status", clandestine.onGMCPCharStatus) end
-- Run init clandestine.init()
